name: Phase 3 Consumer - Replace NIXL Plugin
description: Replace pip NIXL plugin with custom Request/Response plugin

tasks.name: Verify Custom NIXL Plugin
commands: test -f {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}} && echo '[OK] Custom plugin found' || { echo '[ERROR] Custom plugin not found at {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}}'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Replace NIXL Plugin
tasks.description: Replace pip NIXL plugin with custom Request/Response plugin

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Replacement
tasks.description: Verify Request/Response code in replaced plugin
commands: strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -q READ_REQUEST && echo '[OK] Plugin contains Request/Response code' || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin verification failed'; exit 1; }
strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -c READ_REQUEST | awk '{print "  READ_REQUEST symbols: "$1}'
